decisions.rationale: AUTH-03 ui_refs name bTGNI, bTHEL, and bTHEQ only — not intermediate group bTHHM. criteria_audit AC-1 and ui_evidence pass for all named ui_refs; the bTHHM flattening is noted as a gap but does not fail AC-1. Simplified shadcn header chrome and unresolved style_ref tokens mirror the AUTH-01/AUTH-02 pattern: full Bubble Group layout and styles.json token bridge belong to MOD-DRSAM-DESIGN-SYSTEM (DS-01). AUTH-04/05 depend_on AUTH-03 for composable step routing and chrome markers, not pixel-perfect bTHHM nesting.

AUTH-03 scope is wizard container and step progression (next_step/previous_step logical branches). criteria_audit AC-3 passes: goNext/goBack mirror bTHIT/bTHIw ChangeThing ±1 over onboarding_step_os; data-workflow-next/back attributes document workflow ids. Per-step ButtonClicked workflows in bTGNJ__workflows____part_A.json are question-panel behavior — AUTH-04 AC-3 (persist answers and advance on validation) and AUTH-05 completion flows own those triggers. Downstream depends_on is satisfiable via shell callbacks without literal CustomEvent dispatch or synthetic event emission.

Mid-flow onboarding_step_os persistence to CurrentUser on each next/back transition is not an AUTH-03 acceptance criterion; review criteria_audit AC-3 explicitly accepts in-memory React state for shell-only scope (prototype defers profile save to completion). AUTH-04 AC-3 assigns answer persistence and step advance on validation to the profile-questions wave. Resume-on-refresh is a valid follow-up hardening item if product requires it; it does not block AUTH-04/05 depends_on gates.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, no blockers, all ACs pass. Deferred: C-1 → DS-01-design-tokens-and-bubble-styles (bTHHM wrapper and style_ref chrome); C-2 → AUTH-04-onboarding-profile-questions / AUTH-05-onboarding-health-load-signals (per-step ButtonClicked workflows); C-3 → follow-up resume-on-refresh if required (per-transition onboarding_step_os profile write).
